meaning: n.九龙(香港对面的半岛),九龙港埠
examples: Do you expect him at Kowloon City Pier?
The Kowloon hills had disappeared completely.
Yes, I would like to buy a new industrial unit in Kowloon Bay.
For years, Kowloon was where you stayed if you were doing business in the garment trade.
For meat-and-potatoes diners, Morton's of Chicago (2732-2343) has opened a restaurant in the Sheraton hotel in Kowloon.
